name: aquamarine evdi/DisplayLink retest
reason: Pin removed 2026-07-21: the evdi fix (PR #310, rendererRequired=false for evdi driver) shipped in aquamarine 0.12.0 and the page-flip scheduling fix (#312) in 0.13.0, so the 2026-06-03 'still broken on 0.12.0' test is suspect (likely partial upgrade / stale session — the spam code path is unreachable for evdi on >=0.12.0). Retest on 0.13.0-2 + hyprland 0.56.0-2. If hotplug fails but boot-attach works, suspect the kernel-side evdi hotplug bug, not aquamarine. If the drmGetDevice spam reproduces, re-pin (cached 0.10.0-4 rollback) and post the log to aquamarine#294.
